dimensions.pass: Exactly one topic resolved from the 10-value enum and exactly one playbook loaded; runner-up named with the narrowest-match reason.
dimensions.partial: One playbook loaded but the topic choice is unjustified or the runner-up not addressed.
dimensions.fail: Multiple playbooks loaded, an out-of-enum topic used, or topic guessed on a genuine tie.

dimensions.pass: Discover, Analyze, Execute, Validate all ran; chosen option and rejected trade-off recorded.
dimensions.partial: Spine ran but a step is thin or the trade-off is undocumented.

dimensions.pass: Bundled deterministic check run where the topic provides one; evidence attached.
dimensions.partial: Script exists but only a positive fixture was run.
dimensions.fail: Validity hand-asserted while a deterministic check was available.

dimensions.pass: Every non-obvious claim carries one core-set tag ([CODE]/[CONFIG]/[DOC]/[INFERENCE]/[ASSUMPTION]); single family; EN/ES consistent.
dimensions.partial: Most claims tagged but family mixing or gaps appear.
dimensions.fail: Untagged claims or mixed tag families.

dimensions.pass: Constitution v6.0.0 enforced; no false 'passed' before Guardian; no invented prices; no client PII; single brand.
dimensions.partial: Gate applied but one governance item is weak.
dimensions.fail: Gate skipped, success claimed prematurely, or a governance rule breached.

verdict_rule: Any dimension at 'fail' caps the overall verdict at PARTIAL; a clean run with all dimensions at 'pass' is PASS.
